name: Gyuniku Negimaki (Steak and Onion Spring Roll)
recipeInstructions:
1. PREPARE IN ADVANCE: Cut onions in half lengthwise, then cut into 4-inch pieces. Place the steak between sheets of greaseproof paper and pound to a thickness of 1/8 inch. Cut the steaks in half crosswise. Arrange strips of onions down the length of each piece of meat.
2. Starting with the wide end, roll into tight cylinders. Secure with toothpicks.
3. TO COOK: Preheat grill. Dip rolls in Teriyaki sauce and grill them 3 inches from heat for 3 minutes. Dip again in sauce and grill for another 3 minutes.
4. Remove toothpicks, trim ends, and cut into 1-inch pieces. Stand each piece on end.
